heading: Documents
myIntro: Here you find the documents your company has uploaded for you (payslips, CU, contracts, notices). Open one to download it: the first time you open it is recorded as read.
errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirmDelete.title: Delete document
confirmDelete.messagePre: You are about to permanently delete
confirmDelete.messagePost: The file will be removed and the employee will no longer be able to see it. Continue?

upload.title: Upload documents (PDF)
upload.subtitle: Drop or pick multiple PDFs (max 15MB each). We try to match each file to an employee by the codice fiscale found in the filename. Review the match and category, then confirm.
upload.unmatchedHint: Some files were not matched automatically: choose the employee from the dropdown before uploading.
upload.partial: Uploaded {{ok}} of {{total}}. Check the failed rows.
upload.allFailed: Upload failed. Check the failed rows.
